subtitle.zh:
无论您是计划进入沙特市场、设立海外分公司，还是拓展中东业务版图，
                中盛启瀚都将为您提供专业、高效的一站式出海服务。

title.zh: 开启您的企业出海之旅

zh.title: 市场调研
zh.desc: 沙特市场深度调研、行业分析、竞品研究、可行性分析报告

zh.title: 公司注册
zh.desc: 沙特公司注册、营业执照办理、银行开户、税务登记全流程代办

zh.title: 签证办理
zh.desc: 工作签证、商务签证、家属签证等代办服务，快速出签

zh.title: 财税法务
zh.desc: 沙特财税合规、记账报税、法律咨询、合同审核等专业支持

zh.title: 办公选址
zh.desc: 办公室/仓库选址、租赁合同谈判、装修协调等落地服务

zh.title: 业务对接
zh.desc: 本地商业资源对接、合作伙伴筛选、政府关系协调

en.title: Market Research
en.desc: In-depth Saudi market research, industry analysis, competitor study, feasibility reports

en.title: Company Registration
en.desc: Company registration, business license, bank account opening, tax registration — full-service

en.title: Visa Processing
en.desc: Work visa, business visa, family visa processing with fast approval

en.title: Finance & Legal
en.desc: Saudi tax compliance, bookkeeping, legal consulting, contract review

en.title: Office Setup
en.desc: Office/warehouse location scouting, lease negotiation, renovation coordination

en.title: Business Matching
en.desc: Local business resource matching, partner screening, government relations

zh.q: 在沙特注册公司需要多长时间？
zh.a: 一般注册流程约需15-30个工作日，具体取决于公司类型和审批进度。我们提供加急服务，可缩短至10个工作日。
可以。沙特允许外资在大多数行业100%持股。部分行业可能需要沙特合作伙伴，我们会根据您的行业提供具体建议。
沙特大部分行业无最低注册资本要求，但建议根据实际业务规模合理设定。我们会根据您的行业提供建议。
可以。我们提供工作签证代办服务，包括签证申请、材料准备、进度跟踪等，快速出签。

zh.q: 在沙特运营需要哪些合规要求？
zh.a: 主要包括年度审计、税务申报、劳工合规、商业登记续期等。我们的财税团队提供全程合规支持。

en.q: How long does it take to register a company in Saudi Arabia?
en.a: Generally 15-30 business days, depending on company type and approval. We offer expedited service to reduce to 10 business days.
Yes. Saudi Arabia allows 100% foreign ownership in most industries. Some sectors may require a local partner; we'll advise based on your industry.

en.q: What is the minimum registered capital?
en.a: Most industries in Saudi Arabia have no minimum capital requirement, but we recommend setting it based on your actual business scale.
Yes. We provide work visa processing services including application, documentation, and progress tracking with fast approval.

en.q: What compliance requirements are needed for operations?
en.a: Mainly annual audits, tax filings, labor compliance, and commercial registration renewal. Our finance team provides full compliance support.

办理工作签证、招聘本地员工、建立薪酬体系，团队快速就位
提供财税法务、市场推广、业务对接等持续运营支持服务
